---
title: "Breanna Brown"
description-meta: "Quarto Academic Website Template adapted by Dr. Gang He"
image: "files/images/profile-2.png"
page-navigation: false
toc: false
#sidebar: false
page-layout: full

about:
  id: hero-heading
  template: trestles
  image-width: 70%
  links:
    - icon: github
      text: Git
      href: https://github.com/brebrown6101
      target: _blank
    - icon: envelope
      text: E-mail
      href: mailto:breannabrown601@gmail.com    
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/breannabrown6101/
      target: _blank

---



:::{#hero-heading}

Hello! My name is Breanna Brown and I am a biostatistician interested in pursuing a career that integrates my passion for statistical research with my commitment to improving community health. I aspire to work as a collaborative biostatistician conducting prevention research within an academic institution or governmental organization. Specifically, I am interested in leveraging methods of causal inference to both establish and standardize best practices in the prevention of chronic physical and mental illnesses and to evaluate strategies
addressing the comorbidities linked with these conditions. I am especially committed to
advancing interventions that are accessible to low-income, unhoused and rural populations.


## Education

- MS Biostatistics, University of Washington | March 2026
- BS Mathematics, Wayne State University | May 2023

:::
